situation: Russian aggression against Ukraine is escalating, and Ukrainian media artists are using their work to document the atrocities.

options.action: Use social media to raise awareness about the situation
options.consequence: Increased international attention and pressure on Russia

options.action: Remain silent and avoid drawing attention to the situation
options.consequence: Reduced international attention and pressure on Russia

common_rookie_mistake: Remaining silent and avoiding drawing attention to the situation
consequence_if_wrong: Reduced international attention and pressure on Russia
rationale: Using social media to raise awareness about the situation can help to increase international attention and pressure on Russia, which can help to bring an end to the aggression.

situation: Social media platforms are blocking posts about Ukrainian soldiers and accusing them of spreading hate speech.

options.action: Contact social media platforms to report the issue and request that they change their algorithms
options.consequence: Social media platforms may change their algorithms to allow more posts about Ukrainian soldiers

options.action: Use alternative social media platforms to share information
options.consequence: Reduced reach and impact of messages

common_rookie_mistake: Using alternative social media platforms to share information
consequence_if_wrong: Reduced reach and impact of messages
rationale: Contacting social media platforms to report the issue and request that they change their algorithms can help to resolve the issue and allow more posts about Ukrainian soldiers to be shared.
